questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Sarah of the Clue Crew shows two haloed figures on the monitor.) Around 700 A.D. saints had round halos, and living people, like John VII of this holy position, got square ones
"Halo" is a song on her 2008 album "I Am... Sasha Fierce"
Known for "Watchmen", this graphic novelist came into prominence with "The Ballad of Halo Jones" in 1984
The narrow-angle type of this eye pressure disease may result in seeing halos around lights

[IMAGE CLUE]
In the eclipse here, we see the halo that's the Sun's outer atmosphere, known by this 6-letter term
This 13th c. Italian's memoirs of China include one of the first European references to the Pacific Ocean
Leif Erikson is credited as the first European to reach N. Amer., perhaps in this "dogged" region on Canada's mainland
This man for whom America is named may have discovered the mouth of the Amazon River
To avoid a rocky crater, Neil Armstrong manually flew the Apollo 11 lunar module to this "sea"
In the 500s B.C. Scylax sailed the length of this longest river of Pakistan to the Arabian Sea & beyond
The name of this zodiac constellation comes from a Latin word for "maiden"
This planet is the brightest object in the sky after the sun & the moon

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Kelly of the Clue Crew shows a constellation on the monitor.) Look for the Big Dipper, then for the three pairs of stars that form the paws when tracing the entire figure of this constellation
This largest moon of Uranus was named for the queen of the fairies in "A Midsummer Night's Dream"
By the mid-'90s Carolyn Shoemaker had discovered more of these than anyone else alive, including Shoemaker-Levy 9
What happens to people who are ignored in a system, or to your coin that rolls through the grate
Piscine metaphor for someone in an unfamiliar situation
The dude who gets the blame, rightly or wrongly
Parachuting from a failing aircraft, or rescuing a struggling company
If you're just like one of your parents, sometimes we say "the apple doesn't" do this
The so-called "texts" of these Egyptian structures tell of the soul's journey to the "field of reeds"
After his hammer is stolen in "The Poetic Edda", he dresses up like a woman, goes to a wedding & eats an ox & 8 salmon

[IMAGE CLUE]
In "The Ramayana", Rama & Sita get a little assistance from Hanuman, a general of these creatures
In a 14th c. tale Gawain causes the Green Knight to lose this, but he picks it up & rides off anyway
The feasting hall is happy for a while after this title Geat rips the arm off a monster; then the monster's mom shows up
"Clueless gamer" Conan O'Brien hit the streets of Los Santos & died (repeatedly!) at a club in this game's "V" edition

[IMAGE CLUE]
An 11th-generation countess, she uses archaeological techniques that have been confused with treasure hunting
Available on PS4, "Neverwinter" is a fantasy RPG that takes place within the lore of this tabletop game

[IMAGE CLUE]
You'll receive mercy from Mercy in this game, & maybe, just maybe, you'll get the Play of the Game
"Hyrule Legends" & "Link's Crossbow Training" are Wii options in this "legendary" game series

final.clue: In August 2015 3 retired Marines helped raise the U.S. flag in this city where they'd hauled it down 54 years earlier
